title: KKTN-016 Business trip! Acme exercise bike is good (at home)! Shizuku-chan, 23 years old Tsukino Shizuku
description: In order to solve the lack of exercise of the AV actress, SOD will deliver a special exercise bike with an electric massager attached to the saddle to the actress's house! The girl this time is innocent and friendly Shizuku-chan. If you ask for a birthday present in that way, I'll give you anything! By the way, when I straddle an exercise bike, Shizuku-chan is seriously broadcasting the live broadcast at first, but my body is getting more and more nervous. When the vibration of the electric massage machine was maximized, he climaxed with a naughty voice echoing throughout the room! And finally, the electric vibrator and saddle ... This is fun to watch!
